⚠ Phase 4 is a **Cline phase** — it runs Part-by-Part in fresh Cline sessions, not in Claude Code.

**What to do now:**

1. Open **Cline** in VS Code
2. Open `.cline/tasks/phase4-part1.md`
3. Say **"Start Part 1"**
4. After Part 1 completes → open a **new** Cline session → open `phase4-part2.md` → "Start Part 2"
5. Repeat through Part 8

**Phase 4 Parts overview:**
| Part | What it builds | Branch |
|------|---------------|--------|
| 1 | Root config files (turbo, tsconfig, eslint, prettier) | `scaffold/part-1` |
| 2 | packages/shared + packages/api-client | `scaffold/part-2` |
| 3 | packages/db (Prisma schema, migrations, seed) | `scaffold/part-3` |
| 4 | packages/ui + packages/jobs + packages/storage | `scaffold/part-4` |
| 5 | apps/web (Next.js full scaffold) | `scaffold/part-5` |
| 6 | apps/mobile (skip if none declared) | `scaffold/part-6` |
| 7 | deploy/compose + tools + SocratiCode artifacts | `scaffold/part-7` |
| 8 | CI + governance + MANIFEST.txt | `scaffold/part-8` |

After Part 8 completes and merges, say **"Start Phase 5"** in a new Cline session.
